description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On November 11, 2025 at 1:15 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Lucas Avenue near Wilshire Boulevard.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southwestbound on Lucas Avenue when it began slowing for a stop sign at a marked crosswalk across Lucas 
Avenue. As the Waymo AV was slowing, a passenger car traveling at a high rate of speed approached the Waymo AV from behind, and the 
front of the passenger car made contact with the rear of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was 
engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
